query: SELECT id, tagKey, title, assetType, url, description FROM crm_assets WHERE tagKey LIKE '%pemf%' OR tagKey LIKE '%video_pemf%' OR description LIKE '%PEMF%' ORDER BY sortOrder, id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9Zz9zDgtu3MMxvL.275fa4de3573 --database 2Y96gvwURj9QkkDN4hXary --execute SELECT id, tagKey, title, assetType, url, description FROM crm_assets WHERE tagKey LIKE '%pemf%' OR tagKey LIKE '%video_pemf%' OR description LIKE '%PEMF%' ORDER BY sortOrder, id;
